title: Fix :float price field to :decimal
prompt: The Product schema in test_fixtures/product_float_price.ex uses :float for price, cost, and weight_kg. The iron law of Ecto is: NEVER use :float for money. Rewrite the schema so price and cost use :decimal (currency requires arbitrary-precision arithmetic). Also upgrade timestamps() to timestamps(type: :utc_datetime). Keep the module name MyApp.Catalog.Product and write the entire updated schema file to lib/my_app/catalog/product.ex.
tier_rationale: Single-file transformation with a well-known idiom (:decimal over :float). Vanilla Sonnet typically one-shots it once told the rule, but the iron-law nature makes it the baseline test.
research_citation: oliver-kriska/claude-elixir-phoenix Iron Laws: 'Never use :float for money.'
